out_of_scope_findings: The existing sample_sports_store.json in game/content/stores/ will conflict with the new sports_memorabilia.json — implementation should use the new file and remove the old one

ItemDefinition.gd has 'name' as field name but Godot Resource already has a 'name' property inherited from Resource — the DATA_MODEL.md uses 'item_name' for this reason, but the actual .gd file uses 'name'. This should be reconciled during issue-001 implementation

The store_type values are inconsistent across existing content: sports_baseball_card uses 'sports', fakemon uses 'fakemon', but STORE_TYPES.md calls them 'sports_memorabilia' and 'pocket_creatures'. Need to standardize during issue-001.
